tips_en: Start with the ABot-N1 paper (Paper 3) — it delivers the most striking results, achieving SOTA across five VLN benchmarks with a +35% gain on POI-goal and successful real-world quadrupedal robot deployment, while its dual-system slow-fast architecture offers a compelling blueprint for interpretable embodied AI. If your interest leans toward evaluation methodology, follow with the AdvancedMathBench paper (Paper 2), which exposes critical weaknesses in how we assess LLM mathematical reasoning and introduces a rigorous meta-verification protocol. The egocentric memory paper (Paper 1) complements the other two by tackling the perception-memory side of agentic AI, sharing with ABot-N1 a focus on hierarchical, multi-timescale processing for real-world interaction.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读 ABot-N1 论文（论文三）——它在五个视觉语言导航基准上达到最先进水平，其中 POI-goal 任务提升 35%，并成功完成了四足机器人真实部署，其双系统慢快架构为可解释的具身智能提供了引人注目的蓝图。如果你的兴趣偏向评估方法，可接着阅读 AdvancedMathBench 论文（论文二），它揭示了当前 LLM 数学推理评估的关键缺陷，并提出了严格的元验证协议。自我中心记忆论文（论文一）则与前两者形成互补，聚焦智能体 AI 的感知-记忆层面，与 ABot-N1 共享对真实世界交互中分层、多时间尺度处理的关注。
